news.title:
Gold and silver prices may remain range-bound amid geopolitical tensions in West Asia and key US data, analysts say.
Gold futures fell marginally, while silver rose 0.5% on MCX; rupee weakness supports domestic bullion prices.

news.title:
JM Financial invests Rs 33.7 crore in its overseas unit to fuel global expansion.
This move aims to support and accelerate the company's international growth strategy.
news.summary:
JM Financial invests Rs 33.7 crore in its overseas unit to fuel global expansion.
This move aims to support and accelerate the company's international growth strategy.

news.title:
JM Financial Ltd to acquire 24.25 lakh shares of JM Financial Overseas Holdings at $3.59M (₹33.7 Cr).
Acquisition supports JMFOHPL's overseas expansion; target entity operates in Mauritius as an investment holding company.
news.summary:
JM Financial Ltd to acquire 24.25 lakh shares of JM Financial Overseas Holdings at $3.59M (₹33.7 Cr).
Acquisition supports JMFOHPL's overseas expansion; target entity operates in Mauritius as an investment holding company.

news.title:
JM Financial flags weak NRI demand and rising rates as risks for luxury realty.
Construction costs are stable, but higher rates may impact borrowing and valuations.
news.summary:
JM Financial flags weak NRI demand and rising rates as risks for luxury realty.

news.title:
Zomato faces limited competition, but Blinkit risks competition from e-commerce giants and agentic AI.
JM Financial sees Eternal's FY28 EV/Ebitda attractive but warns of Blinkit's high risk in quick commerce.

news.title:
NSE sets 0.65% advisory fee for its $2.5B IPO, totaling $16.25M.
Six lead banks, including Kotak Mahindra and JM Financial, will share the fees.
news.summary:

news.title:
JM Financial maintains 'Buy' for Infosys citing steady demand, $4.8B deal wins, and FY26 revenue growth guidance of 3-3.5%.
Infosys's large deal wins, improved discretionary spending in Financial Services and EURS, and AI-led initiatives support growth potential.
news.summary:

news.title:
SEBI's new MF guidelines aim to reduce overlaps and enhance product differentiation.
Changes include lifecycle funds, rationalised sectoral exposure, and co-existing value and contra funds.
news.summary:
SEBI's new MF guidelines aim to reduce overlaps and enhance product differentiation.

news.title:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
They generated ₹8.9 lakh crore revenue in 2025 vs ₹6.7 lakh crore in 2023, showing a 15% CAGR.
news.summary:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
They generated ₹8.9 lakh crore revenue in 2025 vs ₹6.7 lakh crore in 2023, showing a 15% CAGR.

news.title:
Gold loans see a 90% surge, driving India's retail credit boom per CRIF High Mark report.
Indians increasingly leverage gold for financing, moving beyond traditional storage.
news.summary:

news.title:
JM Financial AIF launches a ₹1,500 crore pre-IPO category II AIF, entering pre-IPO investment.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.

news.title:
JM Financial posts PAT above INR 1,000 crore in 9 months, with 17% QoQ growth.
Fees and commission up 32% YoY; IPO pipeline exceeds INR 1,20,000 crore in next 12-18 months.
news.summary:
